name: Basisregistratie Ondergrond (BRO)
operator: TNO / Kadaster / Ministry of the Interior
dataType: Borehole logs, cone penetration tests, groundwater monitoring wells, groundwater levels, soil composition, geotechnical models
description: National key registry of subsurface data including boreholes, cone penetration tests, groundwater monitoring wells, soil and geological models, accessible through REST and SOAP APIs.

name: Bodemloket (Soil Contamination Registry)
dataType: Soil contamination locations, remediation status, historical polluting activities
description: National soil contamination registry showing locations of known or suspected soil and groundwater contamination, remediation progress, and historical polluting activities across the Netherlands.

name: PBL Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency Data
dataType: Land use, urbanisation density (RUDIFUN), spatial planning scenarios, IMAGE model output, renewable energy potentials
description: Strategic environmental assessment data from the Netherlands government policy institute, providing land use, urbanisation density, climate scenarios, and global IMAGE model outputs for spatial planning research.

name: Wageningen University GeoDesk & LGN Land Use Database
dataType: National land use (LGN, 51 classes at 5 m), historical land use (HGN), soil physical properties, geomorphology
description: Wageningen University geodata facility providing the national Land Use Database (LGN) at 5 m resolution with 51 classes, historical land use maps, soil physical data, and geomorphological maps of the Netherlands.

name: Staatsbosbeheer Nature Areas Map
dataType: Nature reserves, forests, play nature areas, recreation infrastructure, Natura 2000 areas
description: Interactive map of all nature areas managed by Staatsbosbeheer, the largest nature conservation organisation in the Netherlands, covering forests, heathlands, dunes, wetlands, and recreation sites.

name: DANS Data Archive (Geospatial Collections)
dataType: Archived geospatial research data, historical topographic maps, cadastral maps, archaeological survey data
description: DANS is the Netherlands institute for permanent access to digital research resources, hosting over 300,000 datasets including geospatial collections with historical topographic maps and archaeological survey data.

name: Nationaal Water Model (NWM)
dataType: Water safety scenarios, fresh water availability, water quality forecasts, flood risk, groundwater levels
formats: Model output files, PDF reports, web viewer
description: Integrated national hydrological model combining water safety, fresh water supply, and water quality sub-models to evaluate impacts of climate change and socio-economic developments on Dutch water management.

name: BIRA-IASB Atmospheric Data (Royal Belgian Institute for Space Aeronomy)
operator: Royal Belgian Institute for Space Aeronomy (BIRA-IASB)
dataType: Stratospheric ozone, greenhouse gases, UV radiation, tropospheric emissions, air quality forecasts
description: Atmospheric observations and model data from the Belgian federal research institute, covering stratospheric ozone, greenhouse gases, UV radiation, tropospheric emissions, and air quality analysis.

name: INBO Open Biodiversity Data
operator: Research Institute for Nature and Forest (INBO)
dataType: Species occurrence records, invasive species checklists, red lists, fish monitoring, bird census data
description: Open biodiversity datasets from the Flemish government research institute, publishing species occurrences, invasive species registries, red lists, and ecological monitoring data through GBIF.

name: Terrascope (VITO Remote Sensing Platform)
operator: VITO (Flemish Institute for Technological Research) / BELSPO
dataType: Copernicus Sentinel-1/2/3 imagery, PROBA-V archive, SPOT-VEGETATION archive, derived land cover products
apiProtocol: OGC WMS, WMTS, openEO, catalog API
description: Belgian collaborative ground segment for Copernicus providing free access to Sentinel satellite data, PROBA-V and SPOT-VEGETATION archives, and cloud processing services for earth observation.

name: Brussels Environment Geodata (Bruxelles Environnement)
dataType: Green spaces, flood risk zones, air quality, noise maps, biodiversity, urban heat islands, soil quality
description: Environmental geodata portal for the Brussels-Capital Region covering green spaces, flood risk zones, noise maps, urban biodiversity, soil quality, and air quality monitoring.

name: geo.be Federal Geodata Portal
dataType: Federal geodata catalogue, INSPIRE datasets, statistical sectors, federal administrative boundaries, topographic base data
description: Belgian federal geoportal providing a single access point to geographic information from federal institutions, including INSPIRE-compliant datasets, statistical sectors, and topographic data.

name: Sciensano / Healthdata.be (Environment & Health)
dataType: Environmental health surveillance, disease registries, air pollution health effects, antimicrobial resistance, food safety
formats: CSV, Excel, PDF reports, interactive dashboards
description: Belgian public health institute providing environment-health surveillance data, disease registries, and exposure monitoring through the Healthdata.be platform with FAIR data principles.

name: Marine Institute Data Catalogue (Ireland)
dataType: Oceanography, sea temperature, salinity, currents, wave forecasts, fisheries, marine buoy observations
description: Ireland's National Oceanographic Data Centre providing ocean observation data, fisheries surveys, wave and temperature forecasts, and marine environmental monitoring from the national buoy network.

name: Teagasc Irish Soil Information System (SIS)
dataType: National soil map (1:250,000), soil associations, soil series properties, county soil maps, soil drainage, soil pH
description: National soil information system providing a 1:250,000 soil map of Ireland with soil association data, physical and chemical properties, drainage classes, and land use suitability assessments.

name: NPWS Maps and Data (National Parks & Wildlife Service)
dataType: Designated site boundaries (SAC, SPA, NHA), habitat maps, species records, national park boundaries
formats: Shapefile (ITM projection), Web viewer, PDF reports
description: Spatial data from Ireland's nature conservation authority providing boundaries for Special Areas of Conservation, Special Protection Areas, Natural Heritage Areas, and national parks with associated species and habitat data.

name: Inland Fisheries Ireland Open Data Hub
dataType: Fish population surveys, salmon monitoring, eel monitoring, river barriers, angling sites, WFD fish monitoring
description: ArcGIS Hub portal for Ireland's inland fisheries data including fish population surveys, salmon and eel monitoring programmes, river barrier assessments, and Water Framework Directive monitoring.

name: HeritageMaps.ie (Heritage Council Map Viewer)
dataType: Archaeological sites, built heritage, natural heritage, biodiversity records, historic graveyards, pilgrim paths, maritime heritage
description: Interactive heritage map viewer combining cultural, built, and natural heritage datasets from over 100 sources, including archaeological sites, biodiversity records, historic surveys, and local heritage data.

name: Catchments.ie (EPA Water Framework Directive Portal)
dataType: Water body status, water quality monitoring, catchment assessments, WFD risk scores, pressures, chemistry data
description: EPA portal for Ireland's Water Framework Directive implementation, providing catchment assessments, water body status classifications, monitoring data, and interactive water quality maps for all 46 national catchments.

name: INFOMAR Seabed Mapping Programme
dataType: Bathymetry, backscatter, seabed sediments, sub-bottom profiles, seabed classification
description: National seabed mapping programme providing high-resolution bathymetry, backscatter, and sediment data for Ireland's marine territory at 5 to 100 m resolution under Creative Commons licensing.

name: CSO Census Mapping & Small Area Statistics
dataType: Population, housing, demographics, commuting patterns at small area level (18,919 areas)
formats: CSV, Excel, PDF, interactive web maps
description: Interactive census mapping and small area population statistics from the Irish Central Statistics Office, covering 18,919 small areas with demographic, housing, and socioeconomic indicators.
